basics.name: Youhao Hu
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Power Electronics
basics.summary: Ph.D. student at The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou), working on power electronics, wireless power transfer, motor drive systems, sliding mode control, and embedded implementation.

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)
highlights: Supervisors: Dr. Wei Han and Prof. C. C. Chan.

awards.title: Gold Medal, International Exhibition of Inventions of Geneva
awards.summary: International Exhibition of Inventions of Geneva, Switzerland.

awards.title: Fully Funded PhD Scholarship
awards.awarder: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)

projects.name: New Propulsion System for Unmanned Vessels
projects.summary: Wireless-powered full-azimuth podded thruster with WPT system design, high-frequency converter control, motor drive control, sealed mechanical design, and prototype validation.
